[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01110000 3
1 01000010 2
2 11100010 4
3 10110101 5
4 11100110 5
5 01111010 5
6 11110010 5
7 11111110 7
